assessment.note: She names a clear near-term focus—stabilizing and reducing reactive work—which is strong clarity with mild ownership and forward movement.

new_queue.label: Visible ownership
new_queue.name: Where do you want more visible ownership on the frontend work?
new_queue.description: Gets at recognition and influence without asking whether she feels appreciated.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what would make the next two weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes on practical next steps that reduce load or friction without opening a new topic.
